prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年理科最低位次约2022名，2023年前移至1900名，2024年大幅后移至5138名（新高考改革首年波动），2025年回升至2821名。近4年波动剧烈，2025年基准位 次约2821名；2022年理科计划23人，2023年21人，2024年20人，2025年物理类23人。211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第57名，近年排名从第47名（2021）小幅下滑至第57名（2026），整体仍处于全国前列。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 2026年声誉监测中该校未出现明显负面舆情；抖音热度评价为"一般"（综合热度约20.6万，排名第91位），短视频曝光量处于中等水平，未见报考热度异常信号；历史投档异常 记录中无该校断档信息；应用经济学A、工商管理A、外国语言文学A-，均为A类学科，在财经类院校中实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济类专 业2024年热度评级为"分化观望"，社会舆论对财经类前景存在分歧；法学"分化观望"；工商管理类"明显劝退"。宁夏2026年高考报名 总人数约66000人，较2025年（约65897人）基本持平略增，竞争略有加剧；学校位于北京，对宁夏考生具有较强地域吸引 力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次2821名、2026年宁夏考生总数略增、财经类整体热度降温及学校排名小幅 下滑等因素，预计2026年理科/物理类最低录取位次在2821名基础上小幅后移。预测最低位次约2851名，区间2351-3351名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 法学类（法学，可参与法学-大数据双学士学位项目或涉外型卓越经贸法律人才实验班选拔）
- 数据科学与大数据技术（大类招生，含智能科学与技术、人工智能）
- 经济学类（国际经济与贸易、财政学、税收学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 金融工程（大类招生，含金融科技，可参与金融科技与北邮人工智能联合学士学位项目选拔）
- 工商管理类（会计学、财务管理等，可参与会计学与北邮计算机/金融科技联合学士学位项目选拔）
- 精算学（可参与精算学-劳动与社会保障双学士学位项目等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 金融学类（金融学、金融学（国际金融与市场）、经济与金融、投资学、保险学）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间2351-3351名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间上限（如低于2351名）可重点冲击法学类、数据科学与大数据技 术等一档专业。精算学与金融工程虽属二档但学科实力强，值得重点关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the lowest ranking for science was approximately 2022, moving forward to 1900 in 2023, then significantly dropping to 5138 in 2024 (first year of new college entrance exam reform fluctuation), and rebounding to 2821 in 2025. The past 4 years have seen drastic fluctuations, with the baseline ranking for 2025 being approximately 2821; the science enrollment plan was 23 in 2022, 21 in 2023, 20 in 2024, and 23 for physics category in 2025. It is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 57th, with recent rankings slightly declining from 47th (2021) to 57th (2026), still among the top nationally.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In the 2026 reputation monitoring, the university showed no significant negative public opinion; its Douyin (TikTok) popularity rating is 'average' (comprehensive popularity about 206,000, ranking 91st), with short video exposure at a medium level, showing no abnormal signals in application popularity; there is no record of enrollment gaps in historical admission anomalies; Applied Economics A, Business Administration A, Foreign Languages and Literature A-, all A-class disciplines, highlighting its strength among finance and economics universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity rating for finance/finance/economics majors is 'differentiated wait-and-see', with social opinion divided on the prospects of finance and economics; law is 'differentiated wait-and-see'; business administration is 'clearly discouraged'. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Ningxia college entrance exam is approximately 66,000, basically flat with a slight increase compared to 2025 (about 65,897), indicating slightly intensified competition; the university is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal for Ningxia candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2821, a slight increase in the total number of Ningxia candidates in 2026, the overall cooling of finance and economics majors, and a slight decline in the university's ranking, it is expected that the lowest admission ranking for science/physics category in 2026 will slightly move back from the baseline of 2821. The predicted lowest ranking is approximately 2851, with a range of 2351-3351.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Law (Law, can participate in Law-Big Data dual bachelor's degree program or selection for International Outstanding Economic and Trade Legal Talent Experimental Class)
- Data Science and Big Data Technology (enrolled by major category, including Intelligent Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence)
- Economics (International Economics and Trade, Public Finance, Taxation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Financial Engineering (enrolled by major category, including Financial Technology, can participate in selection for Financial Technology and BUPT Artificial Intelligence Joint Bachelor's Degree Program)
- Business Administration (Accounting, Financial Management, etc., can participate in selection for Accounting and BUPT Computer Science/Financial Technology Joint Bachelor's Degree Program)
- Actuarial Science (can participate in Actuarial Science-Labor and Social Security dual bachelor's degree program, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Finance (Finance, Finance (International Finance and Markets), Economics and Finance, Investment, Insurance).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 2351-3351, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (e.g., below 2351), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 majors such as Law, Data Science and Big Data Technology. Although Actuarial Science and Financial Engineering are Tier 2, they have strong academic strength and are worth special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum ranking for liberal arts was approximately 328; in 2023, it moved forward to 283; in 2024, it significantly dropped to 2392 (first-year fluctuation due to new college entrance exam reform); in 2025, the history category rebounded to 637. Over the past 4 years, rankings have fluctuated sharply, with the baseline ranking for 2025 being approximately 637. The enrollment plan for liberal arts was 18 in 2022, 20 in 2023, 20 in 2024, and 20 for the history category in 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 57th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a slight decline from 47th (2021) to 57th (2026), still among the top nationally. In the 2026 reputation monitoring, no significant negative public opinion was detected. Douyin popularity evaluation is "average" (comprehensive popularity about 206,000, ranking 91st), with short video exposure at a medium level, showing no abnormal signals in application popularity. No record of enrollment gaps in historical admission anomalies. Applied Economics A, Business Administration A, Foreign Languages and Literature A-, all A-level disciplines, demonstrating strong strength among finance and economics institutions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Finance/Economics/Economy majors in 2024 have a popularity rating of "differentiated wait-and-see," with societal opinions divided on the prospects of finance and economics. Law is "differentiated wait-and-see." Business Administration is "clearly discouraged." The total number of candidates for the 2026 Ningxia college entrance exam is approximately 66,000, basically flat with a slight increase compared to 2025 (about 65,897), leading to slightly intensified competition. The university is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional appeal to Ningxia candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 637, a slight increase in the total number of Ningxia candidates in 2026, a general cooling of finance and economics popularity, and a slight decline in the university's ranking, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for liberal arts/history category in 2026 will slightly shift backward from 637. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 652, with a range of 152-1152.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Law (Law, eligible for selection into Law-Big Data dual bachelor's degree program or International Outstanding Economic and Trade Legal Talent Experimental Class)
- Supply Chain Management (dual bachelor's degree program with Finance)
- Economics (International Economics and Trade, Public Finance, Taxation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Finance (Finance, Finance (International Finance and Markets), Economics and Finance, Investment, Insurance)
- Business Administration (Accounting, Financial Management, Human Resource Management, Marketing, Business Administration, eligible for selection into joint bachelor's degree programs with BUPT Computer Science/Fintech).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Foreign Languages and Literature (Business English, Translation, English, eligible for selection into dual bachelor's degree programs with Finance/Law/Accounting).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 152-1152, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (e.g., below 152), you can prioritize Tier 1 majors such as Law and Economics. Although Finance is in Tier 2, its discipline evaluation is A, and employment prospects are good, making it worth special attention.
